_README: User-owned Ironman settings that Strava CAN'T provide. Edit these freely. Both scripts/generate-ironman.mjs (placeholder) and scripts/fetch-strava.mjs (live) read this file and embed it into src/data/ironman-training.json, which the chart actually reads. `race.date` drives the countdown; `targets.peakWeeklyHours` drives the readiness gauge; `targets.maxHr` is used to estimate training load from heart rate. `lookbackWeeks` bounds how far back the Strava fetch reaches.
